person_name: Agrippina the Younger (mother of Nero, wife of Claudius)
person_name_full: Agrippina the Younger (mother of Nero, wife of Claudius)
notes: Mother of Emperor Nero and wife of Emperor Claudius, known for her political influence and ambition.

docs.title: Life of Nero
docs.author: Suetonius
docs.excerpt: … of nature, but in her disposition intriguing, violent, imperious, and ready to sacrifice every principle of virtue, in the pursuit of supreme power or sensual gratification.

docs.title: Annals, Book 1
docs.author: Tacitus
docs.excerpt: ( Latin ) But the nearer Germanicus was to the highest hope, the more laboriously did he exert himself for Tiberius, and he made the neighbouring Sequani and all the Belgic states swear obedience to him.

docs.title: Annals, Book 13
docs.author: Tacitus
docs.excerpt: … year, he reflected, now on the domineering temper of his mother, and now again on the character of the young prince, which a trifling circumstance had lately tested, sufficient however to gain for him wide popularity.
